name: Hyperscience Intelligent Document Processing API
what_it_does: Hyperscience enterprise intelligent document processing (IDP) REST API for high-accuracy structured and semi-structured document extraction with human-in-the-loop quality control. Enables AI agents to manage document submission and workflow initiation for automated document ingestion pipelines, handle supervised learning model training and retraining for domain-specific document types, access confidence-based routing for automated extraction vs human review assignment, retrieve structured data output from processed documents for downstream system integration, manage case management and exception handling for documents requiring human intervention, handle document classification for multi-type document routing, access audit trail and extraction provenance for regulated industry compliance, retrieve processing status and throughput metrics for operational monitoring, manage field-level confidence thresholds per document type for quality calibration, and integrate Hyperscience with RPA platforms (UiPath, Automation Anywhere), BPM systems, and enterprise data warehouses.
use_cases: Processing mortgage applications from financial document agents
Extracting insurance claims from P&C automation agents
Digitizing government forms from public sector automation agents
Processing medical records from healthcare document agents
not_for: SMB document processing without enterprise volumes
Simple single-page form extraction (use lighter-weight OCR APIs)
best_when: A large enterprise financial services, insurance, healthcare, or government organization wanting AI agents to automate high-accuracy document processing with confidence-based human-in-the-loop routing and regulated industry compliance controls.
avoid_when: HIPAA PHI MINIMUM NECESSARY FOR HEALTHCARE DOCUMENTS: Automated Hyperscience processing of healthcare documents containing PHI requires business associate agreement; automated extraction and transmission of PHI beyond minimum necessary for specific workflow creates HIPAA violation. ASYNC PROCESSING MANDATORY — NO SYNCHRONOUS EXTRACTION: Hyperscience document processing is inherently asynchronous with processing times from seconds to minutes per document; automated agents must implement webhook callback or status polling architecture; synchronous blocking calls cause timeout and workflow failure. CONFIDENCE THRESHOLD GATING FOR FINANCIAL DECISIONS: Automated routing of extracted financial data (loan amounts, policy numbers, claim values) to downstream decisioning must enforce confidence threshold gate; automated downstream financial actions on low-confidence extraction create financial error and regulatory risk. HITL HUMAN REVIEW LATENCY IN SLA DESIGN: Documents routed to human review (below confidence threshold) introduce minutes to hours of processing latency; automated workflow SLAs must account for HITL queue depth; automated SLA breaches on time-sensitive financial documents create contract and regulatory risk.

auth.notes: Hyperscience uses API key and OAuth authentication. REST API with JSON. New York City HQ. Founded 2014. Private ($1B+ valuation unicorn). Investors: Tiger Global, BlackRock, Stripes, Bessemer Venture Partners. Enterprise IDP with supervised machine learning. Financial services, insurance, government, healthcare verticals. On-premise and cloud deployment. FedRAMP authorized (GovCloud). Competes with ABBYY Vantage, Kofax/Tungsten, and AWS Textract for enterprise IDP.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — enterprise volume subscription with annual commitment
pricing.paid_tiers: Annual enterprise subscription based on document volume; on-premise and cloud deployment options
pricing.notes: New York NY. Private unicorn. Tiger Global, BlackRock, Bessemer investors. FedRAMP GovCloud. Enterprise annual subscription by document volume.

performance.rate_limits: Document submission rate limits per API key; throughput governed by deployment capacity and SLA tier

known_agent_gotchas: ASYNC PROCESSING MANDATORY — ALL DOCUMENTS: Hyperscience has no synchronous document processing endpoint; all document submissions return a case ID for async status polling or webhook callback; automated agents must implement polling loop or configure webhook endpoint before first submission

CONFIDENCE THRESHOLD ROUTING TO HUMAN REVIEW: Documents below configured confidence threshold are automatically routed to human review queue; automated downstream pipeline must handle 'pending human review' status gracefully; design for bimodal processing times (seconds for auto-extraction, hours for human review)

MODEL RETRAINING GOVERNANCE FOR REGULATED DOCUMENTS: Automated retraining triggers on new document samples must be gated by data governance review in regulated industries; automated model updates in production IDP pipeline create GxP or SOX change control issues if untested

On-premise deployment API endpoint dependency — Hyperscience on-premise deployments require agent network access to on-premise API endpoint; cloud agents require VPN or secure tunnel to on-premise Hyperscience installation; latency varies significantly from cloud-hosted option

HIPAA BAA required for PHI document processing — Hyperscience requires separate HIPAA BAA execution before healthcare document processing; automated PHI document submission without BAA creates HIPAA violation; verify BAA execution before production healthcare workflow

FedRAMP GovCloud for government data — government agency automated document processing must use FedRAMP-authorized GovCloud deployment; standard commercial deployment does not meet FedRAMP requirements for CUI/government PII document processing
agent_readiness.security_notes: Enterprise IDP. SOC2, ISO27001, HIPAA, FedRAMP. API key/OAuth. US/EU/On-premise. Document content and extracted sensitive data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Enterprise IDP. SOC2, ISO27001, HIPAA, FedRAMP. API key/OAuth. US/EU/On-premise. Document and extracted financial/health data.
